insights.title: Biquad filter in the monophonic filter unit is restricted to the top of the FX chain
insights.summary: The native monophonic filter module in HISE (which uses biquad internals) can only be placed at the top of the FX chain. To use biquad-style filtering at any arbitrary position in the signal path, the filter must be reimplemented inside a Script FX. Trusted poster 'orange' shared a standalone Script FX implementation of a biquad (LP, HP, LS, HS, Peak) for this purpose. The scriptnode filters.biquad node was presumably introduced to address this structural limitation.
insights.verify_hint: Verify whether the scriptnode filters.biquad node resolves the FX-chain-position restriction that existed for the older monophonic filter module, making the Script FX workaround obsolete.
